name: musicbrainz-mcp
description: Search and browse the MusicBrainz music encyclopedia, fetch cover art, and submit your own tags, ratings, and collections

musicbrainz_user_agent.title: User-Agent (optional)
musicbrainz_user_agent.description: Override the default User-Agent sent to MusicBrainz. Leave blank to use the built-in one.

musicbrainz_oauth_client_id.title: OAuth Client ID (optional)
musicbrainz_oauth_client_id.description: Only for the write tools (tags/ratings/collections). Register an app at https://musicbrainz.org/account/applications.

musicbrainz_oauth_client_secret.title: OAuth Client Secret (optional)
musicbrainz_oauth_client_secret.description: The client secret from your MusicBrainz application registration.

musicbrainz_oauth_refresh_token.title: OAuth Refresh Token (optional)
musicbrainz_oauth_refresh_token.description: A refresh token obtained via the OAuth flow with tag/rating/collection scopes. Enables the write tools.

tools.name: musicbrainz_search
tools.description: Search a MusicBrainz entity type with a Lucene query

tools.name: musicbrainz_lookup
tools.description: Look up a MusicBrainz entity by MBID, with optional inc subqueries

tools.name: musicbrainz_browse
tools.description: List entities linked to another (e.g. all releases by an artist)

tools.name: musicbrainz_cover_art
tools.description: Get Cover Art Archive images for a release or release-group

tools.name: musicbrainz_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a musicbrainz.org URL to its entity + MBID

tools.name: musicbrainz_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify MusicBrainz connectivity and OAuth config

tools.name: musicbrainz_submit_tags
tools.description: Submit user tags to your account (OAuth; confirm-gated)

tools.name: musicbrainz_submit_rating
tools.description: Submit a user rating to your account (OAuth; confirm-gated)

tools.name: musicbrainz_modify_collection
tools.description: Add/remove entities in your collection (OAuth; confirm-gated)
